landing.title: Slab - Knowledge Base & Wiki Software
landing.text:
Slab - Knowledge Base & Wiki Software
Product
Resources
Library
Pricing
Log In
➔
Menu
Build a culture of knowledge-sharing today.
Easily create, organize, and discover knowledge for your entire organization, from non-technical to tech-savvy.
Sign up with Google
or
Get Started
Free up to 10 users
Read our customer stories
Create
Create content that looks good by default.
Slab features the modern editing capabilities you’ve come to expect, all within an intuitive interface. Your content on Slab looks good by default, so you can focus on the writing, not fixing the formatting.
Organize
Make it easy for teammates to browse and discover.
Folders and tags are not enough. Slab Topics both organize and provide relevant context to make it easy for your team to learn about company policies and procedures, and each others' ideas and insights.
Search
Not yet another place to search.
With Unified Search, we'll pull answers from your Slab content
and
all of your integrated tools, bringing you the most relevant results — all in one place.
Integrate
Integrate with your favorite tools.
Slab is a knowledge base, pure and simple. It's a best-in-class product that isn't trying to replace the rest of your stack. That's why it integrates with everything else, including your spreadsheets, slide decks, flowcharts, task managers, and much more.
Switching?
We’ll take care of that for you
Get Started

Frequently Asked Questions
Not seeing your question here?
Email us
Chat with us
Can I use Slab for free?
Yes! Slab is free to for up to 10 users + guests forever. We think you'll love it, whichever plan you are on!
Are there discounts for non-profits or educational use?
Yes! Slab's Startup plan is free for non-profits and educational use. Register for a
free account
and then
request the discount
.
How are users counted for billing?
You will be billed for the number of users who can log into Slab. Admins may deactivate users at any time.
How are guests different from regular users?
Guests only have access to the topics, and posts within topics, that they are a member of. Regular users by default have access to all open topics and published posts.
Learn more about guests
.
Are there readonly users?
No, edit access is based on how content is organized and shared. Slab does not have a user account that inherently cannot edit anything.
What happens if I am not satisfied with Slab?
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked.

analysis.name: Slab
analysis.tagline: Build a culture of knowledge-sharing today.
analysis.value_proposition: A dedicated knowledge base and wiki that integrates with your existing tools to let teams create, organize, and discover company knowledge without replacing the rest of your stack.
analysis.ideal_customer: Teams of 10–500 who want a focused, clean knowledge base that sits alongside (rather than replacing) tools like Slack, GitHub, and Google Workspace

features.name: posts
features.description: Rich-text documents for capturing and sharing knowledge, with modern editing defaults

features.name: topics
features.description: Hierarchical organization unit that provides both structure and contextual framing for related posts
features.evidence_quote: Slab Topics both organize and provide relevant context to make it easy for your team to learn

features.name: private topics
features.description: Topics visible only to invited members, hiding sensitive content from the broader team

features.name: unified search
features.description: Single search that returns results from both Slab content and all connected third-party tools
features.evidence_quote: pull answers from your Slab content and all of your integrated tools, bringing you the most relevant results

features.name: realtime collaboration
features.description: Simultaneous multi-user editing of posts in real time

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built post templates for common knowledge types (code reviews, onboarding, RFCs, etc.)

features.name: verification
features.description: Mark posts as verified/accurate to signal content trustworthiness and staleness

features.name: version history
features.description: Track and restore previous versions of posts; retention window varies by plan

features.name: usage analytics
features.description: Dashboard showing content engagement and readership metrics; window varies by plan
features.evidence_quote: 30 days Usage Analytics … 90 days … 365 days … Unlimited

features.name: custom domains
features.description: Host your Slab knowledge base under a custom company domain

features.name: ai autofix
features.description: AI-powered writing correction and polish for post content

features.name: ai predict
features.description: AI-driven predictive writing assistance to speed up content creation

features.name: ai ask
features.description: Conversational AI Q&A against your knowledge base; advanced version on Enterprise

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on login for team members across all plans

features.name: saml-based sso
features.description: SAML 2.0 enterprise identity provider integration for SSO

features.name: scim provisioning
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via SCIM protocol

features.name: audit logs
features.description: Full activity log for compliance and security review; Enterprise-only

features.name: graphql api
features.description: GraphQL API for programmatic access to Slab content and structure

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhooks to push Slab activity to external systems

features.name: guest access
features.description: Limited-access accounts for external collaborators scoped to specific topics
features.evidence_quote: Guests only have access to the topics, and posts within topics, that they are a member of

features.name: standard integrations
features.description: Embed and sync with standard third-party tools; capped at 10 on free plan

features.name: premium integrations
features.description: Deep integrations with Microsoft, Okta, OneLogin, Zendesk; gated on Business/Enterprise

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Native desktop application for Mac/Windows

features.name: chrome extension
features.description: Browser extension for quick access to and capture into Slab from Chrome

features.name: import & export
features.description: Import content, structure, and users from other tools; export Slab content out
features.evidence_quote: Import content, structure and users into Slab, or take them out with export

features.name: users & groups
features.description: Manage team members and group them for permissions and content targeting
features.evidence_quote: Users & Groups — Get to know your teammates

features.name: admin controls
features.description: Admin panel for configuring Slab workspace settings, billing, and user management
features.evidence_quote: Admin — Set Slab up for your team — 16 articles

features.name: uptime sla
features.description: Contractual uptime SLA for Business and Enterprise customers

features.name: attachment storage
features.description: File attachment support with per-file size limits that scale by plan (10MB–100MB+)

features.name: content embeds
features.description: Embed content from 50+ external tools (Figma, Loom, Miro, etc.) directly inside posts
features.evidence_quote: Integrations & Embeds — Connect Slab with all the other tools you use and love — 57 articles

features.name: user deactivation
features.description: Admins can deactivate users at any time to stop billing without deleting content
features.evidence_quote: Admins may deactivate users at any time.

differentiators: Unified Search that surfaces results from Slab and all integrated tools in one place
Topics provide organizational context beyond folders and tags
Explicitly positioned as best-in-class knowledge base that doesn't try to replace the rest of your stack
Free plan available forever for up to 10 users with no credit card required
Startup plan offered free for non-profits and educational organizations

free_tier.limits: 10 users, 3 guests/user, 10MB attachments, 90-day version history, 10 standard integrations

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 10 users, unlimited posts/topics, realtime collab, templates, unified search, basic SSO

tiers.name: Startup
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited users, private topics, AI Autofix, 365-day version history, unlimited standard integrations

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: SAML SSO, SCIM, AI Predict + Ask, GraphQL API, webhooks, 3 premium integrations, uptime SLA

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 100+ users, audit logs, unlimited premium integrations, advanced AI Ask, dedicated support, custom attachments

pricing.notes: Annual billing shown; monthly rates available but not captured in source. Startup plan is free for non-profits and educational orgs. Monthly prices not shown in source data — only annual rates captured. 30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans. Enterprise requires minimum 100 users.

recent_hn.title: Slab tearing and segmented subduction termination driven by transform tectonics
